summary: We recommend seeding D1 with the 13 outcomes-mcp tick pairs plus 2 outcomes spec repo pairs as the first 15 of the 20 D1 targets. The tradeoff against synthesizing fixture pairs is that real merged-PR pairs better reflect the production distribution that D3 will run a confusion matrix over and the orchestrator dogfood pattern guarantees each pair already passed the gate. The remaining 5 land in tick 14 from real merged PRs that are not part of the tick orchestrator sequence so the set spans both orchestrator and operator-authored stylistic profiles.

claims.statement: outcomes-mcp pull 13 adds 30 files to evals pairs passing representing 15 outcome and report pairs because the PR diff lists exactly 30 new pair files.

citations.title: evals pairs passing after the seed

claims.caveats: D1 remains in_progress at 15 of 20; the next tick adds 5 more from cross-source PRs.

claims.statement: all 15 seeded pairs verified at or above 3.5 because the MANIFEST md verification log records 15 of 15 passing on 2026-05-22.
claims.caveats: If a future verifier swap re-scores pairs below 3.5 they move out of the passing set.

open_questions: Should the verification log roll forward on every D1 commit or only when MANIFEST changes?
methodology_notes: Copied 13 outcomes-mcp tick pairs and 2 outcomes spec repo pairs into evals pairs passing then ran the python HeuristicVerifier on each pair.
